The Alpha Priesthood is one of the three [[Priesthood|Priesthoods]] alongside the [[Omega Priesthood]] and the [[Lambda Priesthood]]

The main purpose of Alpha Priests is to run the [[Alpha Covenant]]. As such Alpha Priests take on a more research focused role to figure out optimal [[Apotheosis]] and [[Childrearing]] techniques and communicate them to the masses.

{{Priestly Lineages}}
[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Alpha Priesthood]][[Category:Alpha]]
[[sn:Alpha Priesthood]][[Category:Alpha Priesthood]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
